fields.label: Event Registration (PDF)
fields.helpText: Fill the embedded PDF below. On submit, MegaForm flattens your inputs onto the PDF and stores the file with the submission.

widgetProps.emptyMessage: Configure a PDF source in widgetProps.configJson.
widgetProps.configJson: {"version":1,"mode":"fill","pdfBase64":"","showToolbar":true,"defaultZoom":1,"autoUpload":true,"outputFileName":"event-registration-{date}.pdf","systemFont":"Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif","fields":[{"id":"fullName","kind":"text","page":1,"x":48,"y":150,"width":320,"height":22,"name":"fullName","label":"Full Name","fontSize":11,"required":true,"placeholder":"Your full name"},{"id":"dob","kind":"date","page":1,"x":380,"y":150,"width":165,"height":22,"name":"dob","label":"Date of Birth","fontSize":11},{"id":"email","kind":"text","page":1,"x":48,"y":204,"width":320,"height":22,"name":"email","label":"Email Address","fontSize":11,"required":true,"placeholder":"you@example.com"},{"id":"phone","kind":"text","page":1,"x":380,"y":204,"width":165,"height":22,"name":"phone","label":"Phone","fontSize":11,"placeholder":"+84 ..."},{"id":"address","kind":"text","page":1,"x":48,"y":258,"width":497,"height":22,"name":"address","label":"Mailing Address","fontSize":11},{"id":"year","kind":"dropdown","page":1,"x":48,"y":350,"width":160,"height":22,"name":"year","label":"Event Year","fontSize":11,"required":true,"options":[{"value":"","label":"-- choose --"},{"value":"2024","label":"2024"},{"value":"2025","label":"2025"},{"value":"2026","label":"2026"}]},{"id":"event","kind":"dropdown","page":1,"x":220,"y":350,"width":325,"height":22,"name":"event","label":"Event","fontSize":11,"required":true,"options":[{"value":"Spring Customer Summit","label":"Spring Customer Summit"},{"value":"Annual Hackathon","label":"Annual Hackathon"},{"value":"Year-End Gala","label":"Year-End Gala"},{"value":"MegaForm Builder Bootcamp","label":"MegaForm Builder Bootcamp"}]},{"id":"ticket","kind":"dropdown","page":1,"x":48,"y":404,"width":200,"height":22,"name":"ticket","label":"Ticket Notes","fontSize":11},{"id":"notes","kind":"textarea","page":1,"x":48,"y":416,"width":497,"height":88,"name":"notes","label":"Comments","fontSize":11,"placeholder":"Anything else we should settings.successMessage: Your PDF was generated and attached to your submission.

_template.name: Event Registration (PDF form, professional layout)
_template.description: Single-field MegaForm using the PdfForm widget. A professional 1-page A4 PDF (Event Registration Form) is embedded as base64. HTML inputs overlay each labeled box; on submit pdf-lib flattens the answers onto the PDF and uploads the result as an attachment.
_template.author: MegaForm built-in sample
